introSection: Wendy Glide was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Lang Wheels previously located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK.

sections.title: External links

fullText:
Wendy Glide was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Lang Wheels previously located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK.



Six-car train.


 * A YouTube video with footage of the Wendy Glide
